detailed_results.generated_query: SELECT CASE WHEN IDADE < 18 THEN 'Menor de 18 anos' WHEN IDADE < 65 THEN 'Adulto' ELSE 'Idoso' END AS faixa_etaria, AVG( JULIANDAY(SUBSTR(DT_SAIDA, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(DT_SAIDA, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(DT_SAIDA, 7, 2)) - JULIANDAY(SUBSTR(DT_INTER, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(DT_INTER, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(DT_INTER, 7, 2)) ) AS media_permanencia_dias FROM sus_data GROUP BY faixa_etaria ORDER BY media_permanencia_dias DESC;

detailed_results.question: Qual a relação entre tempo de permanência e taxa de mortalidade?
detailed_results.expected_query: SELECT CASE WHEN (DT_SAIDA - DT_INTER) <= 1 THEN '1 dia' WHEN (DT_SAIDA - DT_INTER) BETWEEN 2 AND 7 THEN '2-7 dias' WHEN (DT_SAIDA - DT_INTER) BETWEEN 8 AND 15 THEN '8-15 dias' ELSE '16+ dias' END AS tempo_permanencia, COUNT(*) AS total_casos, SUM(MORTE) AS total_mortes, ROUND((SUM(MORTE) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)), 2) AS taxa_mortalidade FROM sus_data WHERE DT_SAIDA > DT_INTER GROUP BY tempo_permanencia ORDER BY tempo_permanencia;
detailed_results.generated_query: SELECT (julianday(DT_SAIDA) - julianday(DT_INTER)) AS length_of_stay, COUNT(*) AS total_patients, SUM(CASE WHEN MORTE = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS deaths, (SUM(CASE WHEN MORTE = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS mortality_rate FROM sus_data;

detailed_results.question: Qual o perfil completo dos atendimentos mais caros (top 1% em valor)?
detailed_results.expected_query: SELECT AVG(IDADE) AS idade_media, COUNT(CASE WHEN SEXO = 1 THEN 1 END) AS homens, COUNT(CASE WHEN SEXO = 3 THEN 1 END) AS mulheres, SUM(MORTE) AS total_mortes, AVG(UTI_MES_TO) AS media_uti_dias, COUNT(*) AS total_casos FROM sus_data WHERE VAL_TOT >= (SELECT VAL_TOT FROM sus_data ORDER BY VAL_TOT DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET (SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) * 0.01 AS INTEGER) FROM sus_data));
detailed_results.generated_query: SELECT * FROM sus_data ORDER BY VAL_TOT DESC LIMIT 1;
